properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A friend of Jesus, O what bliss. That one so vile as I Should ever have a friend like this To lead me to the sky.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Friendship with Jesus, Fellowship divine, O what a blessed, sweet communion. Jesus is a friend of mine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A friend when other friendships cease, A friend when others fail, A friend who gives me joy and peace, A friend when foes assail.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A friend when sickness lays me low, A friend when death draws near, A friend as through the vale I go, A friend to help and cheer.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A friend when life’s short race is o’er, A friend when earth is past, A friend to meet on heaven’s shore, A friend when home at last.
